content:
Linguistic Layer Object (Class) Morphism (Transformation)
Phonology SoundForm prosodic → phonemic mapping
Morphology MorphemeGraph concatenation / fusion
Syntax ParseTree dependency projection
Semantics MeaningSpace interpretation functor
Pragmatics ContextSet inference morphism
Discourse NarrativeGraph cohesion morphism
Sociolinguistics StyleBundle register transform
Iconographics VisualSign semiotic embedding
Computational AIFunctor cross-layer composition

Composition rule:
AIFunctor ∘ (VisualSign ∘ ... ∘ SoundForm) = RhetoricalMeaning

⸻

🎨 5. Representational Upgrades
• 3-Axis Cube: (form × function × intent) visualization for any text span.
• Icono-Semantic Cloud: dynamic clustering of emoji/hiero by pragmatic field.
• Sonic-Typography Overlay: map amplitude ↔ font-weight, tempo ↔ kerning.
context: From document: That’s an exceptionally strong synthesis — the GROK-response you drafted… — chunk 4 (chunk 4/18)
